idea-plugin.name: Beacon Terminal Navigator
idea-plugin.description:
Beacon Terminal Navigator

Companion plugin for Beacon, a macOS menu bar app that sends notifications when Claude Code tasks complete.

This plugin provides a local HTTP API that allows Beacon to navigate directly to the correct terminal tab in JetBrains IDEs — no Accessibility permissions or fragile UI automation required.

How it works

  • Starts a lightweight HTTP server on 127.0.0.1:19877 (loopback only)
  • When a Claude Code task completes, Beacon calls the plugin to focus the right terminal tab
  • Uses native JetBrains APIs — works reliably across locales, versions, and custom tab names

API

  • GET /health — returns ok (used by Beacon to detect plugin)
  • POST /focus-terminal — accepts {"project":"…", "tabName":"…"} to focus a terminal tab

Requirements

  • Beacon macOS app installed
  • Terminal plugin enabled in your JetBrains IDE
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • HTTP server on 127.0.0.1:19877 for terminal tab navigation
  • Supports all JetBrains IDEs with the Terminal plugin
